tool_input.command: cat knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f's{i+1}: {s[\"title\"]}\n{s[\"content\"][:300]}') for i,s in enumerate(data.get('sections',[]))]" 2>/dev/null | head -200

tool_input.description: Read key sections about lazy loading and database reading in batches
